Username must be 3-16 characters!: O anav e uźitorosqo trebal te avel 3-16 karakterură!
Password must contain at least one upper: O lav trubul te avel les maj cerra jekh baro lil!
Password must be 8-16 characters!: O lav trubul te avel 8-16 karakterura!
Login Failed!: O login naśti te kerel pes!
● Passwords must match: ● E parovimata trubun te aven sa jekh
Password must contain at least one symbo: O lav trubul te avel les maj cerra jekh simbolo!
Detection failed!: I detekcia naśti te kerel pes!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● O anav e uźitorosqo trubul te avel maśkar 3-16
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● I lungina e parovipnaski trubul te avel maśkar 8-16
Password must contain at least one lower: O lav trubul te avel les maj cerra jekh tikno lil!
Password must contain at least one numbe: O lav trubul te avel les maj cerra jekh gin!
Xramosar jekh fraza anθ-i tiri ćhib...
